Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael D. Singer, Esq. and Isam Khoury, Esq. 619-595-3001 of Cohela Khoury & Singer for Plaintiff.
Andrew Livingston, Esq. and Alexandra Heifetz, Esq. 415-773-5588 for Defendant Bank of the West.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARK SCHWARTZ's Motion for Order And Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Granted/Approved in Full. Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Janine Menhennet, Esq. 619-595-3001 of Cohelan Khoury & Singer for Plaintiff Mark Schwartz.
Andrew Livingston, Esq. 415-773-5588 and Alexandra Stathopoulos, Esq. 415-773-5635 for Defendant Bank of the West.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARK SCHWARTZ'S Renewed Motion For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Granted. Final Approval Hearing shall be held on July 17, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Continued To Mar-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARK SCHWARTZ's Renewed Motion For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

CONTINUED to March 12, 2018, per agreement of the parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

MOTION For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MARK SCHWARTZ MOTION For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Off calendar. Duplicate entry. =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion For Order Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Diana Koury, Esq. 619-595-3001 of Cohelan, Khoury & Singer for Plaintiff Mark Schwartz through Court Call.
Alexandra Stathopoulos, Esq. 415-773-5635 and Andrew Livingston, Esq. 415-773-5588 of Orrick for Defendant Bank of the West.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his intentions. Hearing is held. Plaintiff argues. Defendant argues two points. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARK SCHWARTZ's MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. The matter is continued to March 6, 2018 as a Control Date. Parties to send a letter informing the Court on how to proceed. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
